title: AIIMS Bilaspur Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur (AIIMS Bilaspur) Research Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 01 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Bilaspur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bilaspur Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Research Coordinator.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the post of Research Coordinator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to apply, which is the Walk-in Interview date, is 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Sc. (MLT) or B.Sc. Nursing degree.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 30 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The interview is scheduled to be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh, Pin code: 174037.
